title: The Friendship venture
description:
Play with your friends thanks to the essential mod 📎

There is a bunch of things to discover in this modpack.
body:
Play with your friends thanks to the esential mod 📎

There is a bunch of things to discover in this modpack :

New armor, New items, New mobs, New biomes. 
This modpack is only made for the most adventurer of you. 
New items include : Waystones, Artifacts, Ships. 
A ton of new biomes and structures to explore. 

Probably even more as time goes.
